title: Alien Dictionary
input_format: An array of strings `words` representing a dictionary in a new alien language.
output_format: A string containing the unique letters in the new alien language sorted in lexicographically increasing order by the new language's rules. If there is no valid ordering, return `""`.
constraints:
- `1 <= words.length <= 100`
- `1 <= words[i].length <= 100`
- `words[i]` consists of only lowercase English letters.
